description: Per-game per-device compatibility data for handhelds

schema.status: str — One of: verified | playable | issues | broken
schema.settings: object — Recommended settings for this device
schema.fps_estimate: int — Expected average FPS with recommended settings
schema.tdp_watts: int — Recommended TDP in watts for this device
schema.notes_en: str — English notes on handheld compatibility
schema.notes_es: str — Spanish notes on handheld compatibility

status_values.verified: Works perfectly with no tweaks needed
status_values.broken: Does not work or is unplayable on this device
